name: Jinyu Bio-technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jinyu Bio-technology Co., Ltd. engages in the development, production, and sale of veterinary vaccines in China. The company was formerly known as Inner Mongolia Jinyu Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jinyu Bio-technology Co., Ltd. in December 2015. Jinyu Bio-technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Hohhot, China.
